impact: Gives the worker daemon eight narrow ordered tasks that continue the original PP&D goal without live crawling or authenticated automation, starting with coverage validation and then moving through solar permit fixtures, requirement checks, guardrail tests, and mocked payment-readiness safeguards.
summary: Append the next fixture-first PP&D backlog tranche after the daemon exhausted eligible tasks.
target_task: Supervisor repair: all PP&D daemon tasks are complete; review the original PP&D goal and add the next task-board tranche

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
